message:
🐛 Fix empty card bodies during lazy chunk loading (#782)

Cards wrapped with React.lazy() used Suspense fallback: null, which
rendered nothing while chunks loaded. After CardWrapper's 150ms timeout,
it assumed the card was static with content and stopped showing skeleton.
This caused empty card bodies on first dashboard visit or cold start.

Fix: Add CardSuspenseFallback component that reports isLoading: true to
CardWrapper via CardDataContext during Suspense loading. This triggers
proper skeleton display and refresh icon animation while chunks load.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
